testcase.name: example_tm_a_mmrm.Rd
testcase.system-out: values(selected = "FKSI-FWB") - Setting explicit `selected` while `choices` are delayed (set using `tidyselect`) doesn't guarantee that `selected` is a subset of `choices`. Backtrace: x 1. +-teal.modules.clinical (local) with_mocked_app_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:124:5 2. | +-testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 3. | \-testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 4. +-teal.modules.clinical (local) suppress_warnings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 5. | \-base::withCallingHandlers(...) at test-examples.R:20:3 6. +-testthat::expect_no_error(...) 7. | \-testthat:::expect_no_(...) 8. | \-testthat:::quasi_capture(enquo(object), NULL, capture) 9. | +-testthat (local) .capture(...) 10. | | +-base::withRestarts(...) 11. | | | \-base (local) withOneRestart(expr, restarts[[1L]]) 12. | | | \-base (local) doWithOneRestart(return(expr), restart) 13. | | \-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 14. | \-rlang::eval_bare(quo_get_expr(.quo), quo_get_env(.quo)) 15. \-pkgload::run_example(...) 16. \-base::source(tmp, echo = !quiet, local = env, max.deparse.length = Inf) 17. +-base::withVisible(eval(ei, envir)) 18. \-base::eval(ei, envir) 19. \-base::eval(ei, envir) 20. +-teal::init(...) 21. | +-checkmate::assert(...) 22. | | \-base::eval(dots[[i]], envir = env) 23. | | \-base::eval(dots[[i]], envir = env) 24. | \-checkmate::check_multi_class(modules, c("teal_modules", "teal_module")) 25. +-teal::modules(...) 26. +-teal.modules.clinical::tm_a_mmrm(...) 27. +-teal.modules.clinical:::tm_a_mmrm.default(...) 28. | \-checkmate::assert_class(paramcd_values, "values") 29. | \-checkmate::checkClass(x, classes, ordered, null.ok) 30. \-teal.picks::values(selected = "FKSI-FWB") 31. \-teal.picks:::.pick(...)

testcase.name: example_tm_g_lineplot.Rd
testcase.system-out: variables has eager choices (character) while datasets has dynamic choices. It is not guaranteed that explicitly defined choices will be a subset of data selected in a previous element. Backtrace: x 1. +-teal.modules.clinical (local) with_mocked_app_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:124:5 2. | +-testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 3. | \-testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 4. +-teal.modules.clinical (local) suppress_warnings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 5. | \-base::withCallingHandlers(...) at test-examples.R:20:3 6. +-testthat::expect_no_error(...) 7. | \-testthat:::expect_no_(...) 8. | \-testthat:::quasi_capture(enquo(object), NULL, capture) 9. | +-testthat (local) .capture(...) 10. | | +-base::withRestarts(...) 11. | | | \-base (local) withOneRestart(expr, restarts[[1L]]) 12. | | | \-base (local) doWithOneRestart(return(expr), restart) 13. | | \-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 14. | \-rlang::eval_bare(quo_get_expr(.quo), quo_get_env(.quo)) 15. \-pkgload::run_example(...) 16. \-base::source(tmp, echo = !quiet, local = env, max.deparse.length = Inf) 17. +-base::withVisible(eval(ei, envir)) 18. \-base::eval(ei, envir) 19. \-base::eval(ei, envir) 20. +-teal::init(...) 21. | +-checkmate::assert(...) 22. | | \-base::eval(dots[[i]], envir = env) 23. | | \-base::eval(dots[[i]], envir = env) 24. | \-checkmate::check_multi_class(modules, c("teal_modules", "teal_module")) 25. +-teal::modules(...) 26. +-teal.modules.clinical::tm_g_lineplot(...) 27. | \-teal.modules.clinical:::migrate_value_choices_to_picks(...) 28. \-teal.picks::picks(...) 29. \-teal.picks:::.check_picks(picks, check_dataset)

skipped.message: Reason: wip - being finished in a different PR ('test-shinytest2-tm_a_mmrm_picks.R:1:1')

testcase.name: e2e_tm_g_lineplot_Module_initializes_in_teal_without_errors.
testcase.system-out: variables has eager choices (character) while datasets has dynamic choices. It is not guaranteed that explicitly defined choices will be a subset of data selected in a previous element. Backtrace: x 1. \-teal.modules.clinical (local) app_driver_tm_g_lineplot() at test-shinytest2-tm_g_lineplot.R:64:3 2. +-teal.modules.clinical:::init_teal_app_driver(...) at test-shinytest2-tm_g_lineplot.R:14:3 3. | +-testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at ./helper-TealAppDriver.R:26:3 4. | \-TealAppDriver$new(...) at ./helper-TealAppDriver.R:29:7 5. | \-teal (local) initialize(...) 6. | \-checkmate::assert_class(app, "teal_app") 7. | \-checkmate::checkClass(x, classes, ordered, null.ok) 8. +-teal::init(...) 9. | +-checkmate::assert(...) 10. | | \-base::eval(dots[[i]], envir = env) 11. | | \-base::eval(dots[[i]], envir = env) 12. | \-checkmate::check_multi_class(modules, c("teal_modules", "teal_module")) 13. +-teal.modules.clinical::tm_g_lineplot(...) 14. | \-teal.modules.clinical:::migrate_value_choices_to_picks(...) 15. \-teal.picks::picks(...) 16. \-teal.picks:::.check_picks(picks, check_dataset)

testcase.error: Error in `chromote_wait_for_condition(self$get_chromote_session(), script, timeout = timeout, interval = interval)`: Timed out waiting for JavaScript script to return `true` i `timeout`: 30000 i `script`: document.getElementById("teal-teal_modules-nav-line_plot-module-param-inputs-summary_badge") !== null Backtrace: x 1. \-teal.modules.clinical:::set_teal_picks_slot(...) at test-shinytest2-tm_g_lineplot.R:117:3 2. \-teal.modules.clinical:::.teal_picks_click_summary_badge(...) at ./helper-TealAppDriver.R:202:3 3. \-app_driver$wait_for_js(...) at ./helper-TealAppDriver.R:162:3 4. \-shinytest2:::app_wait_for_js(...) 5. \-shinytest2:::chromote_wait_for_condition(self$get_chromote_session(), script, timeout = timeout, interval = interval) 6. \-rlang::abort(...)

testcase.name: tm_g_lineplot_builds_a_teal_module_with_teal.picks_defaults
testcase.system-out: values has eager choices (character) while variables has dynamic choices. It is not guaranteed that explicitly defined choices will be a subset of data selected in a previous element. Backtrace: x 1. \-teal.modules.clinical::tm_g_lineplot(label = "Line Plot", dataname = "ADLB") at test-tm_g_lineplot.R:27:3 2. +-teal.modules.clinical:::migrate_value_choices_to_picks(...) 3. \-teal.picks::picks(...) 4. \-teal.picks:::.check_picks(picks, check_dataset)

testcase.name: tm_g_lineplot_builds_a_teal_module_with_teal.picks_defaults
testcase.system-out: values has eager choices (character) while variables has dynamic choices. It is not guaranteed that explicitly defined choices will be a subset of data selected in a previous element. Backtrace: x 1. \-teal.modules.clinical::tm_g_lineplot(label = "Line Plot", dataname = "ADLB") at test-tm_g_lineplot.R:27:3 2. \-teal.modules.clinical:::create_picks_helper(...) 3. +-base::do.call(...) 4. \-teal.picks (local) `<fn>`(`<datasets>`, `<variabls>`, `<values>`) 5. \-teal.picks:::.check_picks(picks, check_dataset)
